name: sfwms-monorepo
description: FreshKeep - Smart Food Warehouse Management System (SFWMS)

scripts.backend:all: concurrently "npm run core:start" "npm run iot:start" "npm run ai:start" "npm run notification:start" "npm run warehouse:start" "npm run inbound:start" "npm run outbound:start" "npm run report:start"
scripts.install:services: cd backend/services/core-service && npm install && cd ../iot-service && npm install && cd ../ai-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install && cd ../warehouse-service && npm install && cd ../inbound-service && npm install && cd ../outbound-service && npm install && cd ../report-service && npm install
